items.caption: A vast junkyard filled with a large collection of vintage mustang cars, predominantly from the 1960s and 1970s. the cars are in various states of disrepair, with rust and decay evident on their exteriors. the junkyard is expansive, with the cars scattered across the field, some stacked on top of each other. the sky is overcast, casting a soft light over the scene. the image also contains text that reads "behold the world's largest vintage mustang junkyard," suggesting that this is a unique and extensive collection of these classic vehicles.
